tournament.format_SCRABBLE: Groups of four share one board; the top two advance. First-round losers get a second chance in the losers bracket.

tournament.format_CHESS: Classic knockout — win your match and advance.
tournament.format_MONOPOLY: Tables of up to 8 players; each table winner advances to the next round.

settings.doNotSell: Do not sell my personal information

errors.network: No connection. Check your network and try again.

howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.intro: GridClan Puzzles is a free, skill-based puzzle game with four games. Play to earn points and gems, and climb the leaderboards. Points are a pure measure of skill — they have no cash value and can never be withdrawn.

WORD_SEARCH.name: Word Search Grid
WORD_SEARCH.how: A grid hides words running across, down, and diagonally — forwards or backwards. Tap the first and last letter of each word to mark it. Find them all, faster and with fewer mistakes, for a higher score.

scrabble.name: Grid Scrabble
scrabble.how: Build words on a shared board, taking turns. Every move appears on your friend’s screen instantly. You score the points of the words you make.

gomoku.name: Grid Connect
gomoku.how: Take turns placing stones; first to line up five in a row — across, down, or diagonally — wins. Win quickly for a bigger points bonus.

battleship.name: Grid Battleships
battleship.how: Your fleet is hidden on a grid. Take turns firing at the enemy waters and sink every ship to win. Win with more ships afloat for a bigger bonus.

solo.name: Solo
solo.desc: Play on your own to practise and earn points & gems.

friend.name: Friend
friend.desc: Invite a friend and go head-to-head on the same puzzle.

tournament.name: Tournament
tournament.desc: Compete against your community for gem rewards. Hints are disabled — pure skill.

howToPlay.scoring: All four games earn you points, scored on the server so results are always fair. Each game scores in its own way — word value in Scrabble, finding speed in Word Search, and a win bonus in Connect and Battleships. Points reflect your skill only: no money, no pay-to-win, and no cashing out, ever.
howToPlay.leaderboard: Your points place you on the global leaderboard. Climb the overall ranking — the sum of all four games — or filter by a single game to see who tops it. Top players show on the home screen.
howToPlay.gems: Gems are an in-game extra you earn by playing or watching optional ads. In solo and friend games you can spend them on hints, revives and replays, or gift them to friends. Gems have no real-world value and can’t be bought or exchanged for money.
howToPlay.fair: The game server is the referee. Moves that are impossible or impossibly fast are rejected, so everyone competes on a level field.

challenge.title: Friend challenge
challenge.intro: Challenge a friend: you both solve the same puzzle, then your scores are compared. No need to be online at the same time.
challenge.startBody: We’ll create a puzzle and start your round. Afterwards you’ll get a code to share.
challenge.createFailed: Could not start a challenge. Please try again.
challenge.notFoundBody: The code may be wrong or the challenge has expired.
challenge.invitedBody: Accept to play the same puzzle, then see who scored higher.
challenge.full: This challenge already has two players.
challenge.playBody: Solve the puzzle — your score is locked in when you finish.
challenge.waiting: Waiting for your friend to play their round…
challenge.sharePrompt: Send your friend the link — one tap opens this challenge:
challenge.shareMessage: Play my GridClan puzzle challenge! Tap to join: {{link}}  (or enter code {{code}} in the app)

join.badLink: This invite link doesn’t look right. Ask your friend to resend it.

gomoku.homeDesc: Race a friend to line up five stones in a row.

battleship.title: Grid Battleships
battleship.homeDesc: Hunt and sink your friend’s hidden fleet.
battleship.intro: Your fleet is hidden on a 10×10 grid. Take turns firing at the enemy waters — sink every ship to win. Hits and misses sync to both players instantly.
battleship.startBody: We’ll place your fleet and give you a code to share with a friend.

chess.title: Grid Chess
chess.homeDesc: Play the classic game of kings, live, move for move.
chess.intro: The classic game of kings — full rules, live moves, and a 5-minute clock per move. Win by checkmate… or on time.
chess.startBody: You play white. We’ll give you a code to share — your friend joins as black.
chess.createFailed: Could not start a game. Please try again.
chess.joinFailed: Could not join that game. Check the code.
chess.tournamentBody: Chess tournaments are classic knockout brackets — win and advance until one champion remains.
chess.waitingOpponent: Waiting for a friend to join as black
chess.notYourTurn: Wait for your opponent to move.
chess.forfeitMessage: You resign and your opponent wins. This cannot be undone.
chess.sharePrompt: Send your friend the link — one tap seats them as black:
chess.shareMessage: Play chess with me on GridClan! Tap to join: {{link}}  (or enter code {{code}} in the app)
chess.soloBody: Take on the chess engine solo. Pick a difficulty and climb the level ladder — Easy blunders often, Hard rarely.

monopoly.title: Grid Tycoon
monopoly.homeDesc: Buy, build and bankrupt rivals — 6-8 players, tournaments only.
monopoly.manageHint: Tap your properties to build or mortgage
